steps.title: Use the bar height
steps.content: The horizontal axis gives the charge amount in kilowatt-hours, and the vertical axis gives the number of days. The question asks for the bar at $0$ kWh.

steps.title: Read the value at 0 kWh
steps.content: The bar above $0$ kWh reaches a height of $6$. That means the battery received $0$ kWh on $6$ of the $15$ days.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $0$, $0$, is the charge amount, not the number of days.
  • Choice B — $1$, $1$, matches other bars, not the $0$ kWh bar.
  • Choice C — $4$, $4$, matches the $11$ kWh bar.
  • Choice D — $6$, $6$, is the height of the $0$ kWh bar. Correct.
That matches Choice D — $6$.
